ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patents" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent */,
  "pf_no" INTEGER /* Patent filing number */,
  "p_no" TEXT /* Patent number */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the patent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the patent (e.g., Filed, Pending, Granted) */,
  "a_month" INTEGER /* Month of patent application */,
  "date_entry" TEXT /* Date of patent entry */,
  "p_year" INTEGER /* Year of patent application */,
  "patent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent type */,
  "patent_office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent office */,
  "filing_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filing status */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date of patent application */,
  "grant_date" TEXT /* Date of patent grant */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date of patent expiration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_filing_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("filing_status_id") REFERENCES filing_statuses ("filing_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_patent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_type_id") REFERENCES patent_types ("patent_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patents_patent_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_office_id") REFERENCES patent_offices ("patent_office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_types" (
  "patent_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent type */,
  "patent_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the patent type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patent type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_offices" (
  "patent_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patent office */,
  "patent_office_name" TEXT /* Name of the patent office */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the patent office */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the patent office is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filing_statuses" (
  "filing_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filing status */,
  "filing_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the filing status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filing status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filing_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the researcher belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_researcher" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the patent (e.g., inventor, co-inventor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_departments" (
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patent_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "earning_date" TEXT /* Date of the earning */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the earning */,
  "licensee" TEXT /* Name of the licensee */,
  "royalty_rate" REAL /* Royalty rate for the patent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_earnings_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "fee_date" TEXT /* Date of the fee */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., annual, renewal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_fees_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, view patent) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., pdf, docx) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_documents_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patent_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "patent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patent */,
  "citation_name" TEXT /* Name of the citation */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., journal article, conference paper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patent_citations_patent_id FOREIGN KEY ("patent_id") REFERENCES patents ("patent_id")
)
column_names: Status of the patent (e.g., Filed, Pending, Granted)
Unique identifier for each patent type
Unique identifier for each patent office
Country where the patent office is located
Unique identifier for each filing status
Name of the head of the department
ID of the department the researcher belongs to
Role of the researcher in the patent (e.g., inventor, co-inventor)
